message.thinking:
We need to evaluate the given text against three questions. The text is: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts: TODO". That is a placeholder. So obviously it does not list main sections, does not describe contents, and does not give structure. So for each question, we need to provide feedback. The JSON array must contain exactly 3 objects, one per question. Each object must have keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on which question. The "feedback" should mention problems. "complies" boolean false for all three.

Thus produce:

[
    {"question":"Chapters","feedback":"The text contains only a placeholder and does not list any main sections of the thesis.","complies":false},
    {"question":"Description","feedback":"The text does not provide any brief description of the contents of each section; it only contains a placeholder.","complies":false},
    {"question":"Structure","feedback":"The text does not allow the reader to understand the general structure of the thesis; it lacks any organizational information.","complies":false}
]

Make sure it's valid JSON.
